TRIAL MOTION IN DEPT. 611, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ALL CASES IN BRAYTON GROUP 422 FOR TRIAL IS HELD. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER TO CONFIRM THAT ALL COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANTS' OPPOSITIONS ARE RECEIVED. AFTER ORAL ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. CASES ARE ASSIGNED TO 4 SUBGROUPS, AND CASES IN EACH SUBGROUP ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. THE SUBGROUPS ARE AS FOLLOW: GROUP A INCLUDES BREITER, CLOUD, DIETZ, AND GREEN; GROUP B INCLUDES COLE, COOK, AND DENNIS; GROUP C INCLUDES DAVIES AND GUZMAN; GROUP D INCLUDES HERNANDEZ AND HOOKER. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 1/30/09, 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 611 FOR HEARING ON OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. THE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IS DUE BY 12/15/08; OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IS DUE BY 1/5/09. NO TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES ALLOWED FOR HEARINGS IN DEPT. 611. JUDGE: DIANE E. WICK; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD, CSR #11055 (D611)
